name: Aravindhan
title: Full Stack Developer
tagline: Building the future, one API at a time
bio: I'm a full-stack developer obsessed with building things that matter. From pixel-perfect UIs to rock-solid APIs, cloud infrastructure to mobile apps — I run the full stack with high ambition and zero limits. Certified in GCP and Azure. Fluent in AI prompting and vibe coding. If there's a working repo and solid docs, I can pick up any language or framework. Currently open to new projects and collaborations.
